projects.title: S3 Library Platform
projects.description: End-to-end SaaS platform built from a real operational problem
projects.summary: Built a multi-tenant SaaS platform after identifying inefficiencies in library operations. Developed subscription workflows, seat management, attendance tracking, and admin systems. Validated the product through direct interaction with libraries, gaining practical insights into user behavior, operational workflows, and adoption challenges.

projects.title: TypeFromImage
projects.description: Typing platform with custom content support
projects.summary: Built a typing practice platform allowing users to practice using custom text and images. Focused on fast input handling, responsive UI behavior, and validating the product idea through a prototype-first approach.

projects.title: Real-Time Chat + Multiplayer System
projects.description: Real-time communication system with synchronized multiplayer features
projects.summary: Built a real-time application with chat and multiplayer game functionality. Worked on event-driven architecture, WebSocket communication, state synchronization, and multi-user interaction handling.

projects.title: Habiqua Room Rental System
projects.description: Workflow-focused SaaS platform for rental operations
projects.summary: Designed a system for property listing, booking management, pricing workflows, and user operations. Focused on scalable architecture, workflow handling, and maintainable system structure.

projects.title: Expense Tracker Web App
projects.description: Web application for expense management and reporting
projects.summary: Built an expense tracking application with CRUD operations, reporting features, and MySQL database integration. Focused on backend logic, data management, and practical workflow implementation.

projects.title: Sudoku Solver
projects.summary: Implemented a recursive backtracking algorithm for solving Sudoku puzzles efficiently while improving understanding of constraints, recursion, and algorithm optimization.

projects.title: N-Queens Solver
projects.description: Recursive solution for the N-Queens problem
projects.summary: Developed a recursive backtracking solution enforcing row, column, and diagonal constraints while strengthening understanding of recursion and optimization techniques.

projects.title: Rat in a Maze Solver
projects.description: Pathfinding algorithm using recursion and constraints
projects.summary: Built a recursive pathfinding algorithm with constraint checking and boundary validation to improve logical problem-solving and algorithmic thinking.

projects.title: Mars Mission Graphics Program
projects.summary: Created a graphical simulation in C to visualize motion and trajectory concepts while learning rendering logic and fundamentals of computer graphics.
